zones.name: Forest
zones.description: Dense woodland surrounding the base. Standard enemies.

zones.name: City
zones.description: Urban ruins with more runners and spitters. Better loot.

zones.name: Military Base
zones.description: Fortified compound. Brutes and a boss. Best loot.

zones.name: Endless
zones.description: No rest. No mercy. How long can you survive? Unlocked after clearing Military.
